bundles.visual_style: Vibrant 3D Pixar-style render, soft cinematic lighting, expressive characters
prompts: A friendly, fuzzy blue monster with large kind eyes sitting on a bathroom stool, happily brushing its teeth with a giant toothbrush, sparkling white foam, morning sunlight streaming through a window, highly detailed fur texture, 8k resolution, whimsical atmosphere.

A cute purple dragon monster sitting at a tiny wooden table, joyfully eating a bowl of bright green peas and broccoli, expressive face showing delight, soft focus background of a cozy kitchen, colorful and kid-friendly aesthetic, cinematic 3D render.

A small orange monster with multiple arms efficiently putting colorful wooden blocks into a toy chest, organized playroom background, soft shadows, warm lighting, teaching children the joy of tidying up, ultra-detailed textures.

A sleepy lime-green monster tucked into a cozy bed with a star-patterned blanket, hugging a small teddy bear, glowing nightlight in the shape of a moon, peaceful and calm bedroom atmosphere, 3D animation style, high quality.

A cheerful turquoise monster standing on a step stool, washing its hands with bubbly soap under a silver faucet, splashing water droplets captured in mid-air, bright and clean bathroom setting, educational and fun vibe, masterpiece quality.

bundles.visual_style: Soft Japanese Kawaii aesthetic, pastel watercolor and clean ink outlines
prompts: A chubby calico cat wearing a tiny knitted strawberry hat, sitting inside a giant ceramic teacup, steam rising in the shape of small hearts, soft pastel colors, white background, minimalist and cute, high resolution.
A small round bunny rabbit gardening in a tiny terracotta pot, holding a small wooden shovel, wearing yellow rain boots, soft watercolor texture, whimsical and cozy, isolated on white background.
A tiny red panda curled up on a fluffy cloud, reading a miniature leather-bound book, soft glowing stars in the background, dreamy pastel aesthetic, perfect for digital stickers, clean edges.

A group of three diverse forest animals (fox, hedgehog, bear) sharing a giant slice of watermelon, picnic blanket texture, bright but soft summer colors, joy and friendship theme, high-quality digital illustration.
A baby elephant floating with a bunch of colorful balloons, soft grainy texture, whimsical storybook style, pastel blue and grey tones, clean white background for easy cropping.

A collection of stylized 70s wildflowers and mushrooms growing out of a vintage roller skate, vibrant orange and teal palette, groovy atmosphere, clean vector lines, high contrast for t-shirt printing.
A 'Stay Groovy' themed illustration featuring a psychedelic butterfly with checkerboard patterns on its wings, muted retro colors, distressed vintage effect, bold balanced composition.
A retro coffee mug with steam forming a peace sign, surrounded by floating daisies and wavy geometric shapes, warm brown and cream color palette, vintage 1970s advertisement style.
A cool capybara wearing oversized 70s aviator glasses and a flower crown, sitting in a vintage teal van, flat illustration, retro aesthetic, earthy tones, high resolution.

A collection of various forest mushrooms and ferns arranged in a dark academia composition, deep forest green and burgundy tones, soft dramatic shadows, vintage lithograph texture.
A mystical Lunar Moth with intricate wing patterns, surrounded by different moon phases and dried lavender sprigs, dark moody background, gold ink highlights, magical botanical art.
An antique-style herbarium page featuring a pressed wild rose with thorns and falling petals, aged paper texture, faded ink, nostalgic and romantic dark academia vibe.
A dramatic composition of a raven perched on a gnarled oak branch intertwined with nightshade berries, dark atmospheric background, classical oil painting strokes, museum quality.
